rationale: Abstract Y uses Europace's exact structured-abstract headings (AIMS / METHODS AND RESULTS / CONCLUSION) and adds the descriptor 'substantial heterogeneity' in the conclusion, giving it a marginally stronger journal fit and conclusion precision over the otherwise near-identical Abstract X.
loser_weakness: Abstract X used a generic IMRAD format rather than Europace's house style (AIMS / METHODS AND RESULTS / CONCLUSION), reducing its journal fit despite identical substantive content.
